description: Implement the Team Room UI: TeamRoomPanel showing human + 4 AI engineers with status, DirectivePanel for adding directives, TeamActivityFeed for recent activity, and integration into WorkspaceLayout
steps: Create src/components/workspace/TeamRoomPanel.tsx showing all 5 team members (You/Human Engineer + 4 AI agents) with their current status derived from session state. Human shows 'active' always. AI agents show truthful states: waiting, proposing, critiquing, revising, consensus, completed based on currentStage and hasCompletedCurrentStage

Create src/components/workspace/DirectivePanel.tsx with 'Add Team Directive' action - distinct from chatbot composer. Textarea with placeholder examples, 500-char limit shown, validation feedback, submit button. On submit: POST to /api/sessions/${sessionId}/directives, clear input, show success feedback

Create src/components/workspace/TeamActivityFeed.tsx that displays recent meaningful team activity derived from the event log (events from useEventStream). Show truthful descriptions: 'You added a team directive', 'Senior Engineer started proposal with N active directives', 'Security Engineer completed critique with N active directives', etc. Show timestamps.
Create src/components/workspace/DirectivesList.tsx that displays currently active human directives from session state, showing directive text, timestamp, and active status indicator

Integrate TeamRoomPanel into WorkspaceLayout.tsx as a new tab or sidebar panel. Add a 'team' tab to the workspace tabs. Include DirectivePanel, DirectivesList, and TeamActivityFeed within or alongside the TeamRoomPanel
Update src/components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.tsx to include the new 'team' tab option
Ensure all UI treats directive text as untrusted user input (no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, text rendered as plain text only)
acceptance_criteria: TeamRoomPanel renders 5 team members with Human Engineer prominently shown
AI agent status in TeamRoomPanel is derived from session state (truthful, not fabricated)
DirectivePanel has clear 'Add Team Directive' action that is visually distinct from a chat input
DirectivePanel validates input (non-empty, max 500 chars) before submission
TeamActivityFeed shows real events with truthful descriptions including directive count where applicable
DirectivesList displays active directives with text, timestamp, and status
New 'team' tab is accessible from WorkspaceLayout
Directive text is treated as untrusted input (no innerHTML, no code interpretation)
UI uses existing project conventions: lucide-react icons, framer-motion animations, Tailwind CSS 4 classes, consistent dark theme colors
verification: Read all new component files to verify they follow existing patterns (use client directive, proper imports, Tailwind classes, framer-motion usage)
Verify WorkspaceLayout integration compiles logically with proper prop passing
Verify no dangerouslySetInnerHTML or eval usage in directive display
